Description: Though they appear to be naught more than simple stones, Garlond Ironworks engineers insist they contain reams of invaluable information on solar measurements gathered by the lost Allagan Empire.
Name: Allagan Tomestone of Heliometry

Description:
Legend states that any who drink this mysterious liquid before lying down for the evening will awaken a new man (or woman).

Grants you an opportunity to edit your appearance in the character creation screen upon your next login.

Legend states that any who drink this mysterious liquid before lying down for the evening will awaken a new man (or woman).

Grants you an opportunity to edit your appearance in the character creation screen upon your next login. Once logged in with a new appearance, you may continue to re-edit within a set period of time.
An illustrated manual depicting the swish-and-flick motions required to conjure up and dispel innocent illusions with a magic wand. Use to learn the /allsaintscharm emote.
Name: Ballroom Etiquette - Wakeful Witchcraft

Description: This circular bench imitates a design seen in Ktisis Hyperboreia, complete with planted vegetation.
Name: Hyperboreia Bench

Description: Simple, unadorned work desks such as this are used to make observations in the Aitiascope. Includes a monitor for keeping track of aetheric fluctuations.
Name: Aitiascope Desk

Description: A softly glowing lamp of the kind used to provide illumination in the depths of the Aitiascope.
Name: Aitiascope Lamp

Description: This barrel of sake is wrapped in a mat of woven rice straw. A specialty product of Hingashi.
Name: Sake Barrel

Description: The vibrant flowers of this elegant garden decoration put one in mind of the faeries' colorful homeland. Pixies thankfully not included.
Name: Il Mheg Arbor

Description: An outdoor lighting fixture of the same ancient Hannish design encountered in the remnants above Alzadaal's Legacy.
Name: Alzadaal's Garden Lamp

Description: A highly sought-after gem whose gentle gradation bears a striking resemblance to an early evening sky.
Name: Twilight Gemstone

Description: This decorative winged object evokes Valigarmanda's elemental prowess and perilous wrath.

This decorative winged object evokes Valigarmanda's elemental prowess and perilous wrath.

※One per estate only.
Twin blades that tell a story of ambition, domination, and loss.

Twin blades that tell a story of ambition, domination, and loss.

※One per estate only.
A window crafted to resemble a Hingan-style sliding door.
Name: Decorative Hingan Door

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a breathtaking view of the Goblet in all its splendor.
Name: Goblet Phasmascape

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a picturesque cluster of hillside houses at the Lavender Beds.
Name: Lavender Beds Phasmascape

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the community of Mist and the stunning stretch of coastline it sits atop.
Name: Mist Phasmascape

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the vibrant rooves and tree-topped outcrops of Shirogane.
Name: Shirogane Phasmascape

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the ornate, pointed spires that punctuate the Empyreum skyline.
Name: Empyreum Phasmascape

Description:
An extravagant chest containing a dark horse champion's weapon.

Required level: 100. IL: 735. Weapon type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Dark Horse Champion's Weapon Coffer (IL 735)

Singular: dark horse champion's head gear coffer (IL 730)
Plural: dark horse champion's head gear coffers (IL 730)
Description:
An extravagant chest with gaudy, overwrought ornamentation that suggests a valuable piece of attire lies within.

Required level: 100. IL: 730. Head gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Dark Horse Champion's Head Gear Coffer (IL 730)

Description: A fulminous chemical mixture synthesized with advanced Everkeep technology. Applying it to Quetzalli weapons enables full optimization of the gear's offensive properties.
Name: Surgelight Solvent

Description: A fulminous thread synthesized with advanced Everkeep technology. Applying it to Quetzalli vestments enables full optimization of the gear's defensive properties.
Name: Surgelight Twine

Description: A fulminous coating agent synthesized with advanced Everkeep technology. Applying it to Quetzalli accessories enables full optimization of the gear's defensive properties.
Name: Surgelight Glaze

Description:
Doesn't have a taste for blood...yet.

Use item to acquire the honeysuckler minion.
Name: Honeysuckler

Description: When blown, this whistle emits a laidback tone that calls your mehwapyarra to your side.
When blown, this whistle emits a laid-back tone that calls your mehwapyarra to your side.

Description: This esoteric tome─the eleventh in an increasingly lengthy series─contains advanced woodworking recipes that can only be learned by dedicated carpenters level 100 and higher.
Name: Master Carpenter XI

Description: This esoteric tome─the eleventh in an increasingly lengthy series─contains advanced smithing recipes that can only be learned by dedicated blacksmiths level 100 and higher.
Name: Master Blacksmith XI

Description: This esoteric tome─the eleventh in an increasingly lengthy series─contains advanced armorcraft recipes that can only be learned by dedicated armorers level 100 and higher.

Description: This rare white mineral is believed to possess medicinal properties, and can be found only in Yak T'el's most hidden cenotes. The leaders of the Mamool Ja considered an offering of mamonite to convey the utmost respect.
Name: Mamonite

Description: A traditional lacquer developed by the Xbr'aal and made of ingredients unique to the forests of Yak T'el.
Name: Xbr'aal Varnish

Description: This coolant absorbs the very heat of surrounding objects and must be handled with care.
Name: Airbright Coolant

Description: An abrasive widely used among the metalworkers of Tural to polish their most intricate works.
Name: Potsworn's Abrasive

Description: A vibrant yarn, spun from the cotton flowers which are native to Urqopacha.
Name: Pelupelu Yarn

Description: The hide of a fearsome caiman which survived nature's most unforgiving conditions and deadliest predators.
Name: Purussaurus Skin

Description: Dried and crushed into dust, this glowing substance is suffused with magical energy.
Name: Glossy Dried Aether

Description: An ingot of smelted maraging steel.
Name: Maraging Steel Ingot

Description: An ingot of smelted sterling silver.
Name: Sterling Silver Ingot

Description: Processed ipe lumber.
Name: Ipe Lumber

Description: Several yalms of blackseed cotton cloth wrapped around a short wooden distaff.
Name: Blackseed Cotton Cloth

Description: A large piece of cured purussaurus skin.
Name: Purussaurus Leather

Singular: bottle of grade 2 gemsap of strength
Plural: bottles of grade 2 gemsap of strength
Description: When applied to items such as battle gear, this Turali gemsap will, similarly to Eorzean dissolvents, dissolve away minute amounts of aether aspected to elements detrimental to strength, and by doing so, better attune the item and its wearer to the remaining beneficial elements.
Name: Grade 2 Gemsap of Strength

Description: It has no rump. It has some grace. This chicken has a gamy taste.
Name: Rumpless Chicken

Description: These earthy spice pods bear a smoky-yet-sophisticated fragrance coveted by many a culinarian.
Name: Brown Cardamom

Description: Slowly and carefully grown at mountainous altitudes, these fresh coffee beans are known to produce more complex flavors than most.
Name: Wild Coffee Beans

Description: Renowned for its natural sweetness and tender, aromatic flesh, this bright citrus is easily recognized by the small hollow in its skin.
Name: Navel Orange

Description: This crustacean hides a sublimely salty-sweet layer of meat under its durable shell, fit for a royal family.
Name: Royal Lobster

Description:
Roasted to crispy perfection, then flavored with garlic and a hint of lemon, a single scent of this dish is enough to make the mouth water.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Roast Chicken

Description:
A hearty pasta dish topped with finely chopped chicken and melting cheese.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Chicken Pasta

Description:
A few choice pieces of rroneek shoulder, stuck on a long spit and slowly roasted until crispy on the outside.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Churrasco

Description:
This creamy, spicy stew is a staple throughout Tuliyollal, and owes its popularity to its flavorful broth.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Moqueca

Description:
The bittersweet flavor of this coffee is complemented by a cinnamon aroma and creamy topping.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Cinnamon Cream Coffee

Description:
These delectable biscuits are made by soaking kukuru chocolate dough in coffee, then sprinkling it with sugar and baking it.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Coffee Kukuru Rusks

Description:
Sweet cookies made from dough mixed with dried navel oranges.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Navel Orange Cookies

Description:
Made from Turali pineapples and navel oranges, the refreshing flavor of this jelly will remind you of Tural no matter where you are.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Pineapple Orange Jelly

Description:
This creamy soup gets its rich flavor from puréed lobster.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Lobster Bisque

Description:
This dish is made by giving the lobster a nice, long, scalding bath and then garnishing it with lemon and salt. A simple process that brings out the flavor of the main ingredient.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>EXP Bonus:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> +3% <UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Boiled Lobster

Singular: set of paladin's dark horse champion's arms (IL 735)
Plural: sets of paladin's dark horse champion's arms (IL 735)
Description:
A set of arms containing a dark horse champion's sword and dark horse champion's kite shield.

Required level: 100. IL: 735.
Name: Paladin's Dark Horse Champion's Arms (IL 735)

Description: Embellished with an array of red ribbons, this understated parasol is perfect for adding a splash of elegance to a rainy day ensemble. Use to unlock a ribboned parasol.
Name: Ribboned Parasol

Description: Nothing screams affluence (and the fragility of one's ego) like an overflowing mountain of silver and gold. Whether it truly is as valuable as it looks will always depend on the market.
Name: Pile of Gold

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>A Risky Bet</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: A Risky Bet Orchestrion Roll

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Pathmaker</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Pathmaker Orchestrion Roll
